mapper.select:
SELECT M.USER_NO AS userNo, M.USER_ID AS userId, M.USER_NM AS userNm, M.USER_TELNO AS telno, M.USER_EML AS userEml, MO.MGMT_OFC_NO AS mgmtOfcNo, AC.APT_CMPLEX_NO AS aptCmplexNo, AC.APT_CMPLEX_NM AS complexName, AD.DONG_NO AS dong, AD.HO AS ho, CASE WHEN HH.HEAD_YN = 'Y' THEN 'HEAD' ELSE 'MEMBER' END AS householdType, HH.INOUT_CD AS moveStatus, TO_CHAR(HH.MOVE_IN_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS moveInDate, TO_CHAR(HH.MOVE_OUT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS moveOutDate, HH.HEAD_YN AS headYn, HH.INOUT_CD AS inoutCd FROM HSHLD_HEAD HH INNER JOIN MEMBER M ON M.USER_NO = HH.USER_NO INNER JOIN APT_DETAIL AD ON AD.HO_NO = HH.HO_NO INNER JOIN APT_UNIT AU ON AU.DONG_NO = AD.DONG_NO INNER JOIN APT_COMPLEX AC ON AC.APT_CMPLEX_NO = AU.APT_CMPLEX_NO INNER JOIN MGMT_OFFICE MO ON MO.APT_CMPLEX_NO = AC.APT_CMPLEX_NO
ORDER BY AD.DONG_NO, AD.HO, HH.MOVE_IN_DT DESC, M.USER_NM

SELECT M.USER_NO AS userNo, M.USER_ID AS userId, M.USER_NM AS userNm, M.USER_TELNO AS telno, M.USER_EML AS userEml, MO.MGMT_OFC_NO AS mgmtOfcNo, AC.APT_CMPLEX_NO AS aptCmplexNo, AC.APT_CMPLEX_NM AS complexName, AD.DONG_NO AS dong, AD.HO AS ho, CASE WHEN HH.HEAD_YN = 'Y' THEN 'HEAD' ELSE 'MEMBER' END AS householdType, HH.INOUT_CD AS moveStatus, TO_CHAR(HH.MOVE_IN_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS moveInDate, TO_CHAR(HH.MOVE_OUT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS moveOutDate, HH.HEAD_YN AS headYn, HH.INOUT_CD AS inoutCd FROM HSHLD_HEAD HH INNER JOIN MEMBER M ON M.USER_NO = HH.USER_NO INNER JOIN APT_DETAIL AD ON AD.HO_NO = HH.HO_NO INNER JOIN APT_UNIT AU ON AU.DONG_NO = AD.DONG_NO INNER JOIN APT_COMPLEX AC ON AC.APT_CMPLEX_NO = AU.APT_CMPLEX_NO INNER JOIN MGMT_OFFICE MO ON MO.APT_CMPLEX_NO = AC.APT_CMPLEX_NO WHERE MO.MGMT_OFC_NO = #{mgmtOfcNo} AND M.USER_NO = #{userNo}
